name: Country Apple Prune Cake
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces (package) Dried pitted prunes; chopped to make 2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, oil, and eggs in a large bowl; beat for 2 minutes.
2. Blend in apples.
3. Combine dry ingredients; gradually beat into egg mixture.
4. Stir in prunes and nuts.
5. Spoon batter into a greased and floured tube pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in pan for 15 minutes; invert onto wire rack to cool.
8. Just before serving, dust cake with confectioners' sugar.
Yield: 12-14 servings
